title: neomammillaria prolifera
intro: Neomammillaria prolifera, also known as the Proliferous Pincushion Cactus, is a type of flowering cactus native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can aid in wound healing and reduce pain. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as a natural diuretic. The herbal preparation of Neomammillaria prolifera is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used in topical applications to promote skin health and soothe skin irritations.
